code.name: MCNP
code.notes: Results contributed by Hrvoje Brkic (HB_ filename prefix). Output filenames use HB_ prefix. Note naming inconsistencies: HB_Z_narrow_LET__p6 has a double underscore while HB_Z_narrow_LET_p3 does not.

outputs.description: Depth LET profiles along the Z axis in silicon. 2 files: DLET (p3) and TLET (p6) for primary protons only.
outputs.notes: HB_Z_narrow_LET_p3 and HB_Z_narrow_LET__p6 differ in underscore count; inconsistency within the same plan. Format is 2-column (depth, LET) with no uncertainty column.

outputs.description: Depth dose profile along the Z axis in silicon. 2 files: flux of primary particles (p1) and dose via F6 tally (p02).
outputs.notes: p1 is named HB_Z_narrow_dose_p1 (no leading zero) while p02 uses HB_Z_narrow_dose_p02. The p1 file is a flux (F4) tally; p02 is a dose (F6) tally.

outputs.description: Flux and dose in silicon target volume. 2 scalar outputs: p01 (F4 flux) and p02 (F6 dose, MeV/g/SP).
outputs.notes: Both files contain a single integrated value with uncertainty.
